title: perichasma laetificata var. obovata
intro: Perichasma laetificata var. obovata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, also known as the coffee or madder family. It is a plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Perichasma laetificata var. obovata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even exhibit anticancer properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for medicinal use through herbal decoctions, infusions, and extracts, with leaves and roots being the primary parts used for preparation.
